title: Crispy Malaysian Citrus Stir-fry
description: A dairy-free and citrusy dish that combines crispy bread with a flavorful citrus zest, perfect for quick weeknight meals.
instructions: Slice the rye bread into rounds and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the slices and bake for about 8 minutes or until golden brown, flipping halfway through.
While the bread is cooking, mix together orange zest, lemon zest, minced garlic, sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt. Stir well to combine.
Once the bread is done, remove from the air fryer and drizzle with olive oil before spreading the citrus mixture evenly over both sides of each slice.
Let it cool for a few minutes and serve as a snack or appetizer.
